triggers.name: Watched item looted
triggers.comments: Fires after a System/Event Sources trigger observes loot and the item matches this character's watch list. Raw log grammar and capture mapping remain editable trigger data. Available fields are ${item}, ${quantity}, ${appliedQuantity}, ${corpse}, ${remaining}, ${quests}, and ${completed}.

triggers.name: Watched mob killed
triggers.comments: Fires after a System/Event Sources trigger observes a death and the mob matches this character's kill watch list. The parser never sends directly to an overlay. Available fields are ${mob}, ${killer}, ${appliedQuantity}, ${remaining}, ${quests}, and ${completed}.

triggers.name: Finishing Blow
triggers.comments: The Finishing Blow AA proc — YOUR big kill moment on the Impact overlay (blade slash cutting the damage number). Verified Legends formats (both accepted): 'You slash Soldier of V`Zher for 111 (Finishing Blow)' and 'You reave a Teir`Dal ranger for 135 points of damage. (Finishing Blow)'. ${1}=victim, ${2}=damage. Groupmates' Finishing Blows are counted on the Scoreboard but only YOURS pop here; copy this trigger with a name pattern to celebrate a groupmate's.

triggers.name: Level up
triggers.pattern: ^You have gained a level! Welcome to level (\d+)!$
triggers.comments: Ding! Verified in Legends log: 'You have gained a level! Welcome to level 16!'. ${1}=new level. Rare, celebratory — default ON.

triggers.name: Big crit
triggers.comments: A big critical melee hit bursts onto the Impact overlay. Verified crit format: 'You crush Asaka L`Rei for 45 points of damage. (Critical)'. The \d{3,} makes 'big' mean 100+ damage (a regex threshold, since triggers can't compare to a running max — raise to \d{4,} for 1000+). ${1}=victim, ${2}=damage. Default OFF: crits are frequent — enable and tune the threshold to taste.
